headline: DE Step 9 Framework Complete: Cold Outreach Metrics Infrastructure Ready — Campaign Launch Blocked on 4 Prerequisites
highlights: ✅ Complete KPI framework defined (open rate, click rate, reply rate, trial conversion)
✅ 3 email variants created + subject line A/B test strategy documented
✅ Engagement scoring system with 4 priority tiers (Tier 1-4)
✅ LoanAI comparative analysis: 5-email benchmark case study extracted
✅ Expected metrics baseline established (25% open rate, 10% click rate, 3% reply rate target)
✅ Top 5 prospect ranking framework ready (engagement score formula defined)
⚠️ Campaign BLOCKED on: Prospect list (20+ verified contacts pending Apollo enrichment)
⚠️ Campaign BLOCKED on: Landing page deployment (in progress, blocks trial conversion tracking)
⚠️ Campaign BLOCKED on: Trial signup flow (product architecture not finalized)
⚠️ Campaign BLOCKED on: Email tracking infrastructure (ready to configure, awaiting campaign readiness)
📊 3 comprehensive deliverables created: Metrics Report (1500+ words), Execution Roadmap (5000+ words), Status & Blockers (2000+ words)
🎯 Estimated campaign launch: 5-7 days (upon resolving critical path blockers)

next_actions.label: Complete Apollo Prospect List Enrichment (20-50 verified agencies)
Deploy Public Landing Page with Lead Capture Form
Configure Email Tracking Infrastructure (UTM + CRM Integration)
Launch Cold Email Campaign (20 emails, 3 variants, staggered send)
